---
title: "Cat Boost Shenanigans"
execute:
 jupyter: math4025
 cache: true
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from plotnine import *
from pyhere import here
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestRegressor
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from catboost import CatBoostRegressor
from sklearn.metrics import root_mean_squared_error, r2_score
```

```{python}
meta = pd.read_csv(here("data", "MIRION_meta_all_1.csv"), encoding='utf-8-sig')

meta=meta.set_index("YB")

spec_raw = pd.read_csv(here("data", "MIRION_spec_1.csv"), index_col=0, encoding='utf-8-sig')

spec = spec_raw.T.copy()
spec.index.name = "YB"
spec.columns = ["F8", "F12", "F24", "F70", "F160", "F250", "F350", "F500", "F870", "F1100"]
spec.index = pd.to_numeric(spec.index)

mirion = meta.join(spec, how="inner")
mirion.head()
density_only_fluxes = mirion.copy().drop(columns=['T_BOL', 'LRATIO', 'TEMP', 'LM', 'L_BOL', 'MASS', 'DIAM'])
density_only_fluxes_X = density_only_fluxes.drop(columns=['SURF_DENS'])
density_only_fluxes_y = density_only_fluxes['SURF_DENS']
```

```{python}
X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(
    density_only_fluxes_X,
    density_only_fluxes_y,
    test_size = .25,
    random_state=4025
)
```

```{python}
cat_model = CatBoostRegressor(
    iterations=500, 
    learning_rate=0.1, 
    depth=6,
    task_type="GPU"
)
cat_model.fit(X_train, y_train)
```

```{python}
y_preds = cat_model.predict(X_test)
cat_model_rmse = root_mean_squared_error(y_test, y_preds)
cat_model_r2 = r2_score(y_test, y_preds)
print(cat_model_rmse, cat_model_r2)
```

```{python}
(
    ggplot(density_only_fluxes, aes(x='SURF_DENS')) +
    geom_histogram()
)
print(density_only_fluxes['SURF_DENS'].mean())
```
